contracts.transformation: Project identity, authority, state backend, runtime policy, and evidence roots are projected from the listed frozen sources.
preserved_rules: Project policy remains authoritative over shared defaults.
Runtime and evidence roots remain project-local.
contracts.freshness_rule: All sources must resolve at the frozen source commit.

contracts.transformation: Approved operations, prohibitions, next-stage gates, and authority fingerprints map without changing local approval routes.
preserved_rules: Human approval remains mandatory for medium and high risk actions.
Holdout access remains forbidden.
contracts.freshness_rule: State and approval timestamps must not be collapsed when they refer to different snapshots.

contracts.transformation: Risk classes and permanent prohibitions map to allowed and forbidden capability sets with deny-unknown behavior.
preserved_rules: Validation feedback mutation remains forbidden.
Secret, live trading, and automatic promotion capabilities remain forbidden.
contracts.freshness_rule: Approved policy fingerprints must match the frozen source commit.

contracts.transformation: Researcher, Critic, and Director boundaries map as project role descriptors without moving them into Core.
preserved_rules: Researcher cannot critique, approve, compile, or execute.
Critic cannot edit Researcher artifacts.
Director remains the only proposal compiler.
gaps: No distributable shared Role Pack is authorized.
contracts.freshness_rule: Prompt and design sources must remain byte-identical to the frozen commit.

contracts.transformation: Campaign definition and execution authorization are combined read-only; neither source alone is treated as complete authority.
preserved_rules: Compilation authority does not imply execution authority.
Validation, Holdout, Candidate, and strategy mutation boundaries remain explicit.
gaps: Project manifests contain domain-specific execution extensions.
contracts.freshness_rule: Campaign and authorization fingerprints must bind to the same approved proposal version.

contracts.transformation: Constitution ceilings and campaign-specific limits map to the strictest applicable Budget values.
preserved_rules: The strictest budget always wins.
Human stop remains available.
contracts.freshness_rule: Budget sources must share the approved campaign identity.

contracts.transformation: Static readiness and baseline verifier outcomes map to passed, blocked, or error without relabeling environment failure as governance block.
preserved_rules: Known baseline debt remains visible.
Versioned worktree mutation fails verification.
contracts.freshness_rule: Gate evidence must be generated for the mapped commit and worktree.

contracts.transformation: Current projection and append-only registry records map as separate state views; projections never rewrite registry history.
preserved_rules: Illegal transitions fail closed.
No-research and human rejection remain legal terminal states.
gaps: Current projection freshness can differ from later approval artifacts.
contracts.freshness_rule: Projection timestamp and state fingerprint must remain explicit beside later decisions.

contracts.transformation: Human decisions and governance approvals map with bound fingerprints, scope, and decision timestamp.
preserved_rules: Content or state fingerprint changes invalidate approval.
Direction approval is not execution authorization.
contracts.freshness_rule: Every bound fingerprint must resolve to the same immutable artifact version.

contracts.transformation: Blocked actions, invalidations, closure conditions, and safe reopen conditions are projected without reopening a closed branch.
preserved_rules: Automatic closed-branch reopen remains forbidden.
A governance block never becomes a tool error.
gaps: Escalation evidence is distributed across state and closure artifacts.
contracts.freshness_rule: Safe resume conditions must come from the active closure or approval artifact.

contracts.transformation: State, audit report, and approval references are combined as an index; source artifacts remain authoritative and unmodified.
preserved_rules: Harness completion and business readiness remain independent.
Evidence timestamps and fingerprints remain visible.
gaps: No single committed project-level EvidenceBundle exists.
contracts.freshness_rule: No later artifact may silently refresh an earlier state snapshot.

forbidden_inferences: A mapped research role is not a shared Role Pack.
A completed Harness run is not proof of strategy profitability.
A later approval does not refresh an earlier state projection.
